headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) In Focus After U.S. Cyber Threat Warning
summary: Top U.S. agencies CISA, NSA, and FBI issued a joint advisory on heightened Russian state-sponsored cyber risk to critical infrastructure. The warning highlights demand for advanced network and infrastructure security platforms such as those offered by Palo Alto Networks. Palo Alto Networks was cited as a likely beneficiary of increased security focus and potential acceleration in adoption of next generation defenses. For investors watching NasdaqGS:PANW, the timing of this government alert...
